debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
G H : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ AEMeasurable (fun ω => G ω ⊓ H ω) P

proof:
by
    obtain ⟨G', hG_meas, hG_ae⟩ := hG.aemeasurable
    obtain ⟨H', hH_meas, hH_ae⟩ := hY.aemeasurable
    refine ⟨fun ω ↦ G' ω ⊓ H' ω, measurable_iff_adj.2 fun u v ↦
      (measurable_iff_adj.1 hG_meas u v).and (measurable_iff_adj.1 hH_meas u v), ?_⟩
    filter_upwards [hG_ae, hH_ae] with ω hG_eq hH_eq
    rw [hG_eq, hH_eq]
successful_attempts:
by
    obtain ⟨G', hG_meas, hG_ae⟩ := hG.aemeasurable
    obtain ⟨H', hH_meas, hH_ae⟩ := hY.aemeasurable
    refine ⟨fun ω ↦ G' ω ⊓ H' ω, measurable_iff_adj.2 fun u v ↦
      (measurable_iff_adj.1 hG_meas u v).and (measurable_iff_adj.1 hH_meas u v), ?_⟩
    filter_upwards [hG_ae, hH_ae] with ω hG_eq hH_eq
    rw [hG_eq, hH_eq]
